chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2719 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.15279/2023 2. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Mr. Naveed Anjum, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Manzoor Hussain Abro, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Learned counsel states that subject lis is now subject matter of a show cause notice that has been issued to the petitioner. He states that he shall respond to the show cause notice before the issuing authority and if aggrieved of any determinant order will assail the same before the concerned forum. In view hereof, petition appears to have served its purpose and the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
